items.name_cn:
『Celine』
Lisa's Ava Shoulder Bag
Best body shape⚡️Best zipper curve⚡️
All colors in stock⚡️Quality upgraded⚡️
2021 Celine Women's Gift Collection
Premium Edition, Full Steel Hardware, Imported Original Calfskin
Model 193953
The 2021 new shoulder bag series is back with a bang, and the hot shoulder bag is also launching the latest version~
The retro bag shape was a hit at the 1960s Paris Fashion Week. The difference is that today's trendy attitude has been integrated into life. Carrying this piece makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go. Plus, the shoulder bag is retro and never out of style, with a very unique vibe~ A favorite for those who love it.
size 23*14*7
